tasks.application_pending_desc: Your application to become a registered Co-Tasker is currently under review by our moderation team. You will receive a notification as soon as your profile is approved.
tasks.apply_desc: Unlock the ability to bid on tasks, browse our app, and earn money. Fill out the quick details below for moderator approval.
tasks.apply_bio_placeholder: Describe your skills, experience, and the services you can offer...
tasks.apply_skills_placeholder: e.g. Cleaning, Painting, Furniture Assembly (comma separated)
tasks.moderation_pending_desc: Listing is under review and hidden from the public marketplace.
tasks.moderation_rejected_desc: This listing was rejected by moderators. Click to edit and resubmit.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your account settings, localization, and notification preferences
settings.email_notif_label: Receive updates and task status changes via email
settings.privacy_label: Allow public search engines and non-registered users to view my task marketplace feedback
settings.delete_desc: Once you delete your account, all escrow transactions, posted jobs, and history ledger records will be permanently archived or deleted. This action is irreversible.
settings.confirm_delete_msg: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your profile {name}? All pending offers, balance states, and message streams will be deleted forever.
settings.toast_fill_all_pass: Please fill out all password fields
settings.toast_pass_mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
settings.toast_pass_min: Password must be at least 6 characters long
settings.toast_delete_success: Account deletion request submitted. Support will contact you shortly.

login.title: Dopzy Login
login.select_profile: Select a demo profile to sign in
login.brand_desc: Connect with vetted, trusted service providers in your area. From moving to cleaning — every task, matched perfectly.
login.reset_desc: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
login.signup_desc: Sign up to post tasks or offer your services on Dopzy.
login.signin_desc: Sign in to access your dashboard and manage tasks.
login.toast_account_created: Account created successfully! Welcome to Dopzy.
login.toast_email_resent: Verification email resent! Please check your inbox.
login.toast_reset_sent: Password reset link sent! Check your inbox.

browse.title: Marketplace Listings
browse.subtitle: Find services or pick a task to complete

chat.no_chats: Select a conversation to start messaging

marketplace.promo_referral: Dear Customer, for every new customer you refer
marketplace.adjust_filters: Try adjusting your filters, or check back soon for new tasks.

filters.search_prompt: What service are you looking for today?...

new_task.title: Post a New Task
new_task.subtitle: Describe what you need done and get quotes in 3 easy steps
new_task.title_placeholder: e.g. Assemble IKEA PAX Wardrobe in bedroom
new_task.title_hint: Summarize the core service you need
new_task.desc_placeholder: Detail what needs to be done. E.g. tools needed, dimensions of items, apartment level, elevator availability, etc.
new_task.requirements_desc: Specify any must-haves, e.g. "must bring own drill" or "must have a van".
new_task.paste_hint: Paste any public image address url
new_task.step2_title: Step 2: When should this task be completed?
new_task.schedule_asap_desc: Flexible schedule, looking to complete immediately
new_task.asap_tasks_desc: Ideal for urgent needs. Taskers looking for immediate work will receive notifications instantly.
new_task.planned_tasks_desc: Schedule up to 30 days in advance. Allows you to coordinate details with taskers for a specific date.
new_task.budget_fixed_desc: You pay a solid fixed amount for the entire job
new_task.budget_hourly_desc: Pay based on active working hours spent
new_task.budget_offers_desc: No budget declared, taskers propose prices
new_task.budget_amt_hint: This is the total price for the service
new_task.budget_rate_hint: Estimated hourly rate you are willing to pay
new_task.escrow_trust_desc: Your money is held securely by Dopzy until the job is done. It is only released when you approve.
new_task.fair_bids_desc: Choose "Open for offers" to let taskers pitch competitive quotes based on their qualifications.
new_task.step4_desc: Please review your details carefully before posting. Trusted service providers will see this description to formulate their offers.
new_task.desc_error: Description must be at least 30 characters
new_task.addr_error: Address or general area is required
new_task.date_error: Date is required for scheduled tasks
new_task.date_past_error: Date cannot be in the past
new_task.budget_error: Please enter a valid budget amount greater than €0
new_task.post_success: Task posted successfully! It will be visible in the marketplace once approved by moderation.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Context-locked conversations & inquiries
messages.no_conversations_desc: Bids or accepted inquiries will open chat threads here.
messages.no_inquiries_desc: When taskers ask questions about your listings, they will show up here.
messages.select_conversation_desc: Choose a thread from the sidebar to view message history or pending inquiries.
messages.read_only_msg: This task has been assigned to another provider. Chat is now read-only.
messages.read_only_completed_msg: This task is completed. Chat is closed for this thread.
messages.login_required: Please log in to view messages.
messages.toast_offer_accepted: Offer accepted! Funds locked in escrow.

notifications_page.title: Notifications
notifications_page.empty_desc: You'll see updates about your offers, tasks, and reviews here.

moderation.title: Moderation & Admin Panel
moderation.subtitle: Moderate accounts, toggle roles, and approve task listings
moderation.search_users_placeholder: Search users by name, email, or role...
moderation.search_tasks_placeholder: Search tasks by title, category, or description...
moderation.confirm_delete_task: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this task listing?
moderation.toast_approved_task: Task approved and listed in the marketplace!
moderation.toast_disabled_user: User account has been disabled and logged out.
moderation.toast_revoked_tasker: Tasker status revoked. User is now a regular client.
moderation.toast_promoted_tasker: User promoted to approved Tasker status.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your task activity
dashboard.empty_tasks_desc: Post your first task and start receiving offers from trusted providers.
dashboard.open_market_banner_desc: New tasks posted today. Be the first to send an offer!

task_detail.title: Task Details
task_detail.posted_by_you_desc: As the author, you have full control over this listing. Use the tabs below to manage offers, edit details, or answer questions.
task_detail.no_offers_desc: Providers will start submitting bids shortly. We will notify you when a new offer is made.
task_detail.leave_review_desc: How was your experience with the service provider? Let others know!
task_detail.toast_assigned: Offer accepted! The task has been assigned.
task_detail.toast_review_min: Please write at least 10 characters for your review.
task_detail.toast_edit_required: Please fill out all required fields.
task_detail.toast_edit_success: Task updated successfully! It has been submitted for moderation review.
task_detail.confirm_accept_msg: You are about to accept the offer of {price}. All other offers will be auto-declined and the project funds will be placed in secure escrow.
task_detail.confirm_cancel_msg: This will cancel your task posting, delete the listing from the marketplace, and close all pending offers. This action cannot be undone.
task_detail.confirm_complete_msg: Please verify that the work has been completed to your satisfaction. Confirming completion will release the escrow funds directly to the provider.
task_detail.modal_review_placeholder: Tell others what it was like working with this provider. Minimum 10 characters.
task_detail.modal_edit_placeholder_desc: Provide a detailed description of the task...
task_detail.interested_offer_desc: Interested in providing this service? Send your offer details to the client or clarify details first.
task_detail.want_to_provide_desc: You are currently logged in as a Client. To submit offers or ask questions, please upgrade to a Co-Tasker profile.
task_detail.wait_completion_desc: Waiting for the client to confirm completion and release payment from escrow.
task_detail.confirm_withdraw_msg: This will retract your offer from this task listing. The client will no longer see your offer, but you can submit a new one if you change your mind.
task_detail.confirm_update_progress_msg: This will transition the job status to "{status}". The client will be updated on your progress.
task_detail.modal_question_desc: Send a private inquiry to {name} regarding this task. They can accept your request to open a private conversation in Messages.
task_detail.modal_question_placeholder: e.g. Is there parking available? Do I need to bring specialized cleaning equipment?
